reason: Absorbed by violation and responsibility; no distinct primitive role.
systemImpact: Reintroducing liability as a first-class concept would duplicate the current post-duty failure corridor, weaken the violation-responsibility boundary, and invite drift toward sanction or enforcement language.
removalTestResult: The system retains rule-governed duty, unmet-duty state, and post-trigger answerability without a standalone liability concept. Existing runtime structure already covers the proposed consequence-exposure role.
